step_3_attributes.note: Calculate Action Points, Damage Modifier, Experience Modifier, Healing Rate, Hit Points, Initiative Bonus, Luck Points, Magic Points, Movement Rate from characteristics

step_4_culture_and_homeland.note: Choose from 8 cultures: Balazaring, Esrolian, God Forgot, Lunar Heartland, Praxian, Provincial Lunar/Tarsh, Sartarite/Heortling, Telmori

rune_affinities.note: Assign in whatever order player desires

folk_magic.note: Choose from culture's folk magic list

step_7_background_details.note: Optional: family, community, unique past events, social standing
step_7_background_details.reference: RuneQuest core rules p.26-35 or 100 Unique Gloranthan Events

additional_folk_magic.note: Choose from full Folk Magic list

step_10_age_and_bonus_points.note: Determine age and assign final round of skill points

step_11_starting_money_and_equipment.note: Based on culture, rolled in Lunars
step_11_starting_money_and_equipment.currency: Lunar (has substantially more buying power than standard Silver Piece)

step_12_prepare_for_adventure.note: Give character a name and prepare to step out into Glorantha
